_comment: runtime/lane.lock — arbitrates the artisan vs dock lane (DEC-017). Lives at __garelier/<pm_id>/runtime/lane.lock. Written by whoever activates a lane; the artisan releases it on completion. The driver reads it to gate which roles run and never auto-deletes a stale lock (surfaces to PM). For the dock lane, set lane="dock", owner="dock", and omit branch/target_branch.
